atlas v0.8
返回网页家族 / Back To Families

网页家族 / Contemporary Web Family

杂志特稿型 Magazine Editorial

以封面感和主稿节奏为核心的杂志型页面，首屏像一期杂志的 lead spread，而不是通用 SaaS hero。

历史源头 / Historical Roots

装饰艺术 / Art Deco瑞士风格 / Swiss Style

适配结构 / Structure Fit

专题长文型 / Dossier / Feature档案堆栈型 / Archive Stack

真实样本 / Sample Gallery

真实网站样本 / Live Website Samples

从真实站点看这条家族是怎样落地的。

借法 / Interpretation

借这条家族的语法，不只模仿表面 / Borrow the grammar, not only the surface

识别特征 / Signature

  • feature-first hierarchy
  • headline-image tension
  • cover-story rhythm
  • secondary stories feel curated

可借语法 / Borrow

  • strong lead image or cover block
  • decks, bylines, captions, section labels
  • clear editorial pacing from lead to secondary stories

适合内容 / Best For

  • cultural publishing
  • feature homepages
  • brand magazines
  • essay archives

不适合时机 / Avoid When

  • users need fast task completion
  • the page depends on heavy filtering
  • there are too few stories to justify a magazine frame

页面模式 / Page Patterns

这条家族常见会长成哪些页面组织 / The page patterns this family commonly becomes

页面模式 / Page Pattern

live

封面主稿型 Cover-Led Editorial Fold

One dominant lead image or story establishes tone immediately, with secondary stories queued beneath or beside it.

识别信号 / Cues

lead image above the foldheadline-image tensiondeck, byline, caption rhythm

页面模式 / Page Pattern

live

次级故事堆栈型 Story-Led Secondary Stack

After the first story, the page descends into an intentional stack of secondary entries instead of a generic feature grid.

识别信号 / Cues

clear lead-to-secondary handoffeditorial sequencingfew items per band

历史源头 / Historical Roots

如果你喜欢这类网页，往前追会遇到哪几支 / Trace the earlier lineages behind it

1920s-1930s

France / Europe / US

装饰艺术 Art Deco

不少文化、时尚和奢侈品牌网站，会借 Art Deco 的舞台感、对称感和精致节奏。

今天会在网页里变成 / Shows Up In

静奢生活方式型 / Quiet Lifestyle Editorial舞台叙事展示型 / Stage-Driven Showcase
查看流派 / Open Movement

1950s-1970s

Switzerland

瑞士风格 Swiss Style

如果你想做可扫描、可扩展、可归档的知识系统，Swiss 比“简单好看”更重要。

今天会在网页里变成 / Shows Up In

瑞士排印网格型 / Swiss Typographic Grid黑白工作室系统型 / Monochrome Studio Systems证据密集知识型 / Evidence-Dense Knowledge Surface
查看流派 / Open Movement

Prompt 风格包 / Prompt DNA

可以直接给 agent 的风格包 / A ready-to-use prompt packet

Prompt 风格包 / Prompt DNA

杂志特稿型 Magazine Editorial

Use a magazine editorial family: cover-like lead story, large image-led first fold, supporting story stack, disciplined serif hierarchy, and a publication rhythm instead of a SaaS feature grid.

参考链接 / Reference Packet

继续打开真实站点看细节 / Open the live references

  • Frieze
  • T Magazine
  • The New Yorker
